name: codemap
description: Interactive call graph + reading guidance for AI-generated code. Repo-level UML class graph with LSP-calibrated verification.

chatParticipants.name: codemap
chatParticipants.description: Generate an interactive UML call graph for your workspace

commands.name: scope
commands.description: Limit analysis to a subpath, e.g. /scope apps/api/src/Capture

commands.name: focus
commands.description: Re-expand the graph around a single class, e.g. /focus IngestUrlHandler

commands.name: why
commands.description: Explain why a node or edge is partial / unverified

commands.name: explain
commands.description: Explain unverified nodes in the current graph

commands.name: eval
commands.description: Score the current graph against .codemap/golden.json and show precision/recall/F1

commands.name: entries
commands.description: List entry-point classes (HTTP endpoints, CLI mains, workers, samples, public APIs) in the current graph

commands.title: CodeMap: Save Current Graph as Golden

codemap.maxSkeletonFiles.description: Maximum number of files the workspace scanner picks as skeleton for LLM analysis. Each picked file costs ~1 LLM call (cached after first run). Default 500 covers most services end-to-end; lower it if first-run cold start latency matters more than full coverage.

codemap.maxParallelAnalyzers.description: How many single-file analyzers run concurrently.

codemap.strictVerification.description: When true, unverified nodes are shown but not clickable.

codemap.devGoldenPath.description: Path to a golden sample JSON (workspace-relative or absolute). Used for eval scoring; leave empty to fall back to <workspace>/.codemap/golden.json.

codemap.enableAnalyzerCache.description: Cache per-file analyzer results in workspace state. Skips the LM call when (prompt version, file path, file contents) match. Use 'CodeMap: Clear Analyzer Cache' to reset.

codemap.lspWarmupTimeoutMs.description: How long to wait for the language server to produce symbols before starting analysis. Default 30s covers a cold C# Dev Kit start. Raise it for very large solutions.

scripts.eval: node -e "console.error('eval rewrite pending — see docs/plan/v4-plan.md (Phase 3.3)'); process.exit(1)"
